title: Act III — Sandswept to Ziggurat
routingNotes: Servi's choice is permanent — most builds pick Stun Threshold (logout cures bleeds/freeze).
Field vendors give guaranteed rares — Jungle (gloves), Infested (boots), Chimeral (helm).
Servi's Son in Jungle = guaranteed rare belt.
Trial of Chaos: soul core dodge-skip duplicates the core into all sockets.
Sacrificial Heart drops from Vaal Goliaths (canister on shoulder) in Utzaal & Aggorat.
0.5: monster density reduced in back half of campaign — lean on margin-of-safety rule (3 levels under area).
speedrunTips: Don't study layouts — GGG (Sunna) said too much is reworked in 0.5.
Use a vendor regex to highlight wanted bases.
Menu hotkeys: Ctrl on passive tree auto-confirms. Quick Assign for attributes. Ctrl+Shift+L/R-click for weapon swap.
patch05Notes: Patch 0.5 rearranged Act 3's area order. Use the zone list as source of truth; expect minor reordering.

steps.text: Talk to The Hooded One
Kill Rootdredge
Basket at Orok Campsite
Hanging tree corpse
Lvl 33 Ring point of interest
Enter Ziggurat Encampment
Talk Alva, Oswald, The Hooded One
Talk to Farrow → accept Quest 3
steps.note: Upgrade Unique Weapons/Armours dropping below level 55 into endgame-viable bases.

steps.text: Lvl 30 flask upgrade at Rog (increased recovery + charges)
Enter Jungle Ruins (top exit)

zones.name: Jungle Ruins
zones.newIn05: Explorer camps are no longer just vendors. Talk to explorers — they point to the next area and reveal it on the minimap.

steps.text: Kill Mighty Silverfist
steps.note: Dodge slam SIDEWAYS (not backwards) — wave travels in attack direction.

steps.text: Jungle Grave (ravaged corpse) → Servi gives Rare Belt (choice)
Field vendor
Find WP near Venom Crypts
Enter Infested Barrens
Find/talk Alva, take WP near her
Field vendor
Enter Chimeral Wetlands → take WP → return
Enter Azak Bog → take WP → return
TP to Venom Crypts (via Jungle Ruins WP)
Sarcophagus event
Find corpse → loot Corpse-snake Venom
TP back to town
Talk to Servi — PERMANENT CHOICE: +25% Stun Threshold (popular) / +30% Ailment Threshold / +25% Mana Regen
TP to Chimeral Wetlands
Field vendor
Toxic Bloom point of interest
League mech
Enter Temple of Chaos → take WP → return (for 2nd Ascendancy)
Kill Xyclucian, the Chimera → loot Inscribed Ultimatum
Enter Jiquani's Machinarium behind boss
Use Inscribed Ultimatum at trial entrance
Pick favorable mods (avoid lightning runes if low Lightning Res)
Soul Core skip: dodge roll between slam & twist of placement animation — duplicates core into all sockets
Complete trial → 2nd Ascendancy
Layout = squared U-shape, generators at opposite tips
Summon/talk Alva
Loot Small Soul Core → use on Stone Altar next to Alva
Loot 3 Small Soul Cores to open doors
Open door → kill Blackjaw → use Flame Core
Open another door → enter Jiquani's Sanctum
Summon/talk Alva
Loot 2 Medium Soul Cores, place in Generators
Back to start → click Large Soul Core → kill Zicoatly → loot core
TP to Infested Barrens
Use core on Stone Altar next to WP
Enter The Matlan Waterways

zones.name: The Matlan Waterways
zones.newIn05: Levers became walk-over pressure pads, and the final canal section ships pre-drained. The old portal-skip is no longer needed.

steps.text: Hut → kill rare
Walk over pressure pads (6-8 per layout) — auto-activate on contact
Proceed to end of zone — final section is now pre-drained
TP back to town
In town: Downstairs → talk Alva
Enter The Drowned City (bottom exit)
Find Apex of Filth → take WP → return
Find The Molten Vault → take WP → return
TP to Azak Bog
Summon/talk Servi
Flameskin rituals
Kill Ignagduk, the Bog Witch → use Gemrot Skull
steps.note: Boss arena top-right; rotation depends on entrance side.

steps.text: Talk Servi in town for Frozen Charm
TP to Molten Vault (1st char) or town
Kill Mektul, the Forgemaster
steps.note: Return Hammer of Kamasa to Oswald in town to unlock the bench. Skip on alt characters.

steps.text: TP back to town
Talk to Oswald
TP to Apex of Filth
Find 3 Mushrooms → use Cauldron
Pass through bottleneck-with-checkpoint, then check back corners
Kill Queen of Filth → loot Temple Door Idol
steps.note: Stay close — moving away triggers ultimate rolling slam.

steps.text: TP back to town
In town: Downstairs → talk Alva → door behind her → enter Temple of Kopec
Each floor is a triangle — far corner has 50% chance of being correct. Always check it first
Kill Ketzuli, High Priest of the Sun (upstairs)
Talk Alva, wait for lore

zones.name: Utzaal
zones.newIn05: Fate of the Vaal is now core campaign content. 6 beacons in Act 3 + 6 more in Interludes opens Vaal Ruins portal.

steps.text: In town: Take the Gateway → Downstairs → enter Utzaal
Same layout as Drowned City. Follow the paved road — it leads to Viper
Farm Sacrificial Heart from Vaal Goliaths (canister on shoulder)
Find & energise 6 Ancient Beacons across Utzaal & Aggorat → Energised Crystals
Open portal to Vaal Ruins (Fate of the Vaal core mechanic)
Side doors for idols (sell to Oswald for gold)
Kill Viper Napuatzi
steps.note: Highly mobile + evasive — bait first attack cycle from consistent position.

steps.text: Town crier chanting tells you the right direction. Edge of pyramid = boss
Find Sacrificial Altar (top right of map)
Place Sacrificial Heart → stab with Dagger
League mech (Crag Tooth)
Enter The Black Chambers (top left of map)
Kill Doryani, the Blood Alchemist (Act Boss)
steps.note: Phase 2 (Doryani's Triumph): rage → fortifying buff before engaging.

steps.text: Wait for loot (~30s)
TP back to town
Talk to Doryani
Talk Doryani again → Alva → Hooded One → Alva
